code:
import io
import string

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut c0 = 0
mut c1 = 0
mut c2 = 0
mut c3 = 0
mut c4 = 0
mut c5 = 0
mut c6 = 0
mut c7 = 0
mut c8 = 0
mut c9 = 0

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(b)
    match b
    when 48
      c0 = c0 + 1
    when 49
      c1 = c1 + 1
    when 50
      c2 = c2 + 1
    when 51
      c3 = c3 + 1
    when 52
      c4 = c4 + 1
    when 53
      c5 = c5 + 1
    when 54
      c6 = c6 + 1
    when 55
      c7 = c7 + 1
    when 56
      c8 = c8 + 1
    when 57
      c9 = c9 + 1
    when _
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

fn render(_ digit: Int, _ count: Int) -> Unit
  mut hashes = ""
  mut k = 0
  while k < count
    hashes = "#{hashes}#"
    k = k + 1
  end
  print("#{digit}: #{hashes}")
end

render(0, c0)
render(1, c1)
render(2, c2)
render(3, c3)
render(4, c4)
render(5, c5)
render(6, c6)
render(7, c7)
render(8, c8)
render(9, c9)
